Place your hero background video here:

  hero-drone.mp4

Recommended specs:
  - Format: MP4 (H.264)
  - Resolution: 1920x1080 or 1280x720
  - Duration: 15–60 seconds (loops automatically)
  - Content: drones spraying crops / surveying farmland
  - Keep file size reasonable for web (under ~15 MB if possible)

The app references: /videos/hero-drone.mp4

If the file is missing, a poster image is shown instead.
